Case# CWErr.cwUnsupportedRateSetErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwUnsupportedRateSetErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwunsupportedrateseterr#Discussion)

Interface does not support all of the rates in the access point’s basic rate set.
